title: Learning Product Outcomes, Command Vocabulary, and Session Contract · Compiler Case: Pokedex Ts Learner Outcome
summary: A science museum wants a Pokedex kiosk command but has not defined its learner decision, audience needs, command vocabulary, session boundaries, or evidence of understanding. Predict the user decision, runtime value, strict type claim, promise state, API boundary, failure, and observable evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the pokedex ts learner outcome increment in bounded learner-facing command product charter. Learners progress through prediction, e…
objectives: Define learner population, science or coding decision, command journey, accepted failure, feedback, and observable learning value.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Predict Pokedex Ts Learner Outcome
